title: ArmorSwap
description: A mod that allows quick armor swapping with a configurable keybind.
body:
# ArmorSwap

## 📄 Description

**ArmorSwap** is a lightweight mod that lets you instantly swap your armor with a better set from your inventory using a single key press. Ideal for PvP, mining, or quickly reacting to danger.

## ✨ Features

- 🔁 Quick armor switching with a customizable key (default: `R`)
- 🧠 Smart algorithm that selects the best available armor
- 🧱 Supports all modded and vanilla armor
- 🔊 Plays a sound on successful swap
- 🎮 Keybinding can be configured in the controls menu

## 📦 Requirements

- Minecraft **1.20.1**  
- Forge **47.4.4** or newer
